book.note: Local data/orderbook stores ts_ms, symbol, bids/asks price+qty, recv_ms, agg_level; it does not preserve documented order-count n or exchange nonce li.

bbo.note: Best bid/ask can be derived from local orderbook snapshots, but the raw BBO stream fields order id i and last order id li are not stored.

trades.note: Local data/trades stores ts_ms, symbol, trade_id, side, qty, price, recv_ms, cause, event_type, date; April+ cause/event_type are present, but documented history id h and exchange nonce li are not preserved.

candle.note: Trade candles are derivable from trades but raw candle stream is not stored.

mark_price_candle.note: Not derivable from local trades/orderbook without mark-price data; no local mark-price candle partitions found.
